creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I'd just like to point out that I already submitted an update to this port, as 
well as a request to take over maintainership, back in February.  The update was 
not applied because transcode 1.1.x fails to build at all on FreeBSD/amd64. 
I've sent a bug report to the developers of transcode, but have still heard 
nothing back yet.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
